results.race_name: Almins Vantage/Lallemand Magniva Classic EBF Novice Stakes (GBB Race)

runners.comment: Took keen hold - made all - increased tempo over 3f out - ridden over 1f out - pressed towards finish - kept on(op 7/2 tchd 3/1)
Took keen hold - towards rear - headway over 2f out - went second over 1f out - pressed winner towards finish - just held(op 4/9 tchd 2/5 and tchd 8/13)
Raced in second - lost position over 1f out - weakened inside final furlong(op 16/1)

runners.owner: Middleham Park Racing Xxiii M Hulin
runners.comment: Dwelt start - soon in touch with leaders - pushed along and ran green halfway - weakened over 1f out(tchd 8/1)
Reluctant to load - dwelt start - towards rear throughout(op 80/1)
